title: helianthus bracteatus
intro: Helianthus bracteatus, also known as the desert sunflower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthus bracteatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially helping to manage blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
